授業方法: *The schedule listed below is indicative. The format, schedule, and content of graded assignments and classes, as well as the number of assignments, may change during the semester, depending on student needs.This seminar style class will be conducted face to face. However, assignments/homework will be conducted and lesson resources/ information provided on Google Classroom. As such, students will need access to a computer. BYOD to class is recommended- laptop, tablet, or smartphone. Short lectures will be given by the instructor each week. Students are expected to take notes, as these lectures will introduce the themes of the course. Supplementary readings will be assigned for homework to introduce additional information and deepen students’ understanding. Students will also do further research on these topics.Students will have to regularly demonstrate detailed and critical understanding of the content of these lectures and readings, as they will form the basis of written assignments, and active discussions or presentations in spoken English in the following class. Students will be asked to rent at least one movie to watch during this course.

トピック.授業外学習2:
Outside of class:
- Most weeks you will read and analyse articles. These support short lectures delivered in class, and form the basis for in-class written responses and discussions. This should take approximately 1 hour a week. Students will be asked to rent at least one movie to watch during this course.
- In addition, please review each lesson, and check any new content, language or skills learned. This should take approximately 30 minutes a week.
- Written responses and active participation in class discussions are a big part of the grade for this course. Insufficient preparation outside class will severely affect your grade.
- Access any online material required. Some assignments may involve doing additional online research.
- Do not hesitate to contact me if you need any help, I'm happy to speak to you.

教科書/Required texts0: You do not need to purchase a textbook in this course. The instructor will provide all required course materials, and students will also use online resources. However, please be aware that you will be asked to rent at least one movie to watch during this course.
学位授与の方針との関連Relationship to Diploma Polic:
各授業科目は、各学部・研究科の定めるディプロマ・ポリシー（DP）・カリキュラム・ポリシー（CP）に基づき、カリキュラム上に配置されています。
DP・CPを意識して本授業科目の学修を進めることで、各学部・研究科の期待する能力が養成されます。

この授業を履修するには、事前にレベル認定の申請が必要です。詳細は下記URL（kwicのキャビネット）の「履修手続」を確認してください。ENGLISH ONLY 
Instruction and course materials are in English only. 
All work should be conducted in English only.

ATTENDANCE POLICY
-	Students who are absent 3 times or are late 5 times automatically fail. 
-	Present: In class on time
-	Late: 0~ 30 mins late.
-	Absent: Don’t come or more than 30 mins late
-	2 lates = 1 absence
Absences and being late also affect your discussion participation grade. 
Excused absences are only available on application to the office, not at the instructor’s discretion.
